SC-02_am.root_cause: N at lower edge for jointing with moderate moisture drift

actions.today: Apply phase-aligned N correction and light irrigation balance.
actions.this_week: Recheck N and moisture after 2 days and maintain uniform wetness.
actions.avoid: Avoid heavy irrigation that can dilute nutrient uptake.

SC-02_am.advisory_text: Jointing response looks stable. Apply measured nitrogen correction and continue close uptake monitoring.

SC-04_am.root_cause: Grain filling phase with drying trend and active market window

actions.today: Stabilize moisture with light, timely irrigation.
actions.this_week: Track grain fill uniformity and maintain canopy health.
actions.avoid: Avoid last-minute heavy nutrient dosing near harvest window.

SC-04_am.advisory_text: Grain filling phase is active with mandi window open; balance moisture and sale timing.
SC-04_am.mandi_advice: Market trend is active. Plan staggered sale while protecting grain quality.
